name: Night Stalker
description: I feed the darkness and the darkness feeds me.

abilities.name: Hunter in the Night
abilities.description: The higher Balanar's level, the greater the bonus movement speed and bonus attack speed increase. Increases both the base bonus movement speed and base bonus attack speed values.

abilities.name: Void
abilities.description: Damages and applies a movement speed slow on the unit-targeted enemy. Balanar creates a vortex of infinite night, tearing opponents violently into the eternal darkness that once was.

abilities.name: Crippling Fear
abilities.description: Silences and applies damage over time while near the Night Stalker for the duration.

abilities.name: Midnight Feast
abilities.description: Self-heals utilizing lifesteal when attacking enemy units.

abilities.name: Dark Ascension
abilities.description: Grants Night Stalker flying movement, unobstructed vision and bonus attack damage during his ascension.
